name: Missing Synchronization
description: The product accesses a shared resource in a concurrent context without proper synchronization mechanisms. This can cause the resource to enter unexpected states, potentially enabling attackers to influence the shared resource and trigger security-relevant behavior.
detection_pattern: Multiple TRANSFORM or STORAGE nodes access the same shared resource concurrently without a CONTROL node enforcing synchronization (locks, mutexes, semaphores, atomic operations) to prevent race conditions.
